user_query: Add the Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy to mothers day 3 dinner

create_info.description: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy

fields.name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy
fields.short_description: Buttery black cod fillets marinated in a savory-sweet miso glaze, served alongside tender steamed baby bok choy.
fields.meal_suggestion: Marinate the cod in a mixture of white miso paste, mirin, sake, and a touch of sugar for at least 30 minutes. Broil until the surface is caramelized and the fish flakes easily. Serve over a bed of steamed baby bok choy seasoned with ginger and sesame oil.
fields.nutrition_note: Black cod is an excellent source of heart-healthy omega-3 fatty acids. Bok choy provides vitamins A, C, and K, along with calcium and antioxidants. A high-protein, nutrient-dense dinner.

result.reasoning: The user specifically requested this dish for Mother's Day 3 dinner. Since the previous version had all meals deleted for this day, this adds a new meal option to the now-empty dinner category. Position -1 is used to append it as the current dinner choice.
